purpose: Hierarchical list of nested items. Displays parent-child relationships through indentation and expand/collapse affordances.
whenToUse: Hierarchical data with arbitrary depth (file trees, org charts, category hierarchies)
When list of items has parent-child relationships users need to expand/collapse
whenNotToUse: Two-level hierarchy only — use grouped List with section headers
When user needs to compare attributes across items — use Table
doRules: Limit indent to 4 levels max — beyond that, redesign as filtered list
Use a chevron icon for expandable nodes (rotates on expand)
Show expand/collapse state in the icon orientation
dontRules: Do not use Tree for non-hierarchical data
Do not nest Tree inside another Tree
Do not omit the expand/collapse affordance — users cannot discover nesting otherwise
Do not show more than ~200 visible nodes at once — virtualize or filter

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Tree inside a compatible container (Panel, Dialog, DynamicPage).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for data display — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
